# Deck of Many Allies — Allies (EN-US)

## Allies

### Andrey of Gèovan

#### Human • Slyborne • Hunter

> A member of a hidden order, he is dedicated to eliminating threats that should not exist.

**Track:** Whenever an ally deals damage to an adversary, place 1 token on this card.

**Hunter’s Hook:** Spend 3 tokens to make an Agility Roll against a target within Far range. On a success, Andrey pulls the target directly into Melee range.

**Precise Strike:** Spend 3 tokens to have Andrey deal 2d8 physical damage to an adversary within Melee range.

---

### Bernie Kyrellan

#### Canin • Wanderborne • Specialist / Merchant

> A merchant always chasing opportunity. He talks fast, smiles often, and disappears at the first sign of danger.

**Prepared (2):** This card begins with 2 tokens and cannot gain additional tokens until the next rest.

**Ready for Business:** Spend 1 token for Bernie to grant one of the following options.

• An ally clears 1 Armor Slot.  
• An ally clears 1 Hit Point.  
• An ally clears 1 Stress.

---

### Callum O'Mara

#### Firbolg • Ridgeborne • Laborer

> A humble farmer, devoted to his land and to those who depend on it.

**Triumph:** Whenever an adversary is defeated, place 1 token on this card.

**Victory Song:** Spend 1 token for an ally within Very Close range to gain 1 Hope.

**Harvest Song:** Spend 3 tokens and choose two allies within Close range. They may immediately initiate a Tag Team Roll without spending Hope. This ability can only be used once per rest.

---

### Coltan Ganzorig

#### Faun • Ridgeborne • Laborer / Rebel

> With calloused hands and a fiery spirit, he fights both to survive and for those he loves.

**Triumph:** Whenever an adversary is defeated, place 1 token on this card.

**Rebel Strike:** Spend 1 token to have Coltan deal 2d8+3 physical damage to an adversary within Melee range. If that adversary is **Restrained**, deal an additional 1d8 damage.

**Inspire the Rebellion:** Spend 3 tokens for Coltan to grant 1d4 to each ally within Very Close range. An ally can roll this die and add the result to an action roll, reaction roll, or damage roll. Unused dice are lost at the end of the session.

---

### Damir e Ched

#### Faun • Ridgeborne • Laborer

> Young workers carrying heavy pickaxes to break stone... or monsters.

**Opportunist:** Whenever an ally fails an attack roll, place 1 token on this card.

**Brutal Strike:** Spend 3 tokens to have Damir and Ched deal 2d6+3 physical damage to an adversary within Melee range.

---

### Drogathar Kragson

#### Giant • Seaborne • Brute / Pirate

> A seafaring warrior who carries the fury of storms in his veins.

**Inspired:** Whenever an ally rolls with Hope on their Duality Dice, place 1 token on this card.

**Rising Fury:** Spend 1 token to make a target within Melee range Enraged. An Enraged target adds 1d6 to their damage rolls but takes a −2 penalty to Evasion.

**Eye of the Storm:** Spend 3 tokens to amplify the fury of a target that is already Enraged within Close range. The target instead adds 1d10 to their damage rolls and takes a −4 penalty to Evasion.

---

### Elbek Bataa

#### Drakona • Orderborne • Scout

> With a sharp eye and few words, he turns mistakes into second chances.

**Prepared (2):** This card begins with 2 tokens and cannot gain additional tokens until the next rest.

**Second Chance:** When an ally within Close range fails a roll, spend 1 token for Elbek to allow them to reroll one of their Duality Dice.

---

### Elizabeth Ironsong

#### Human • Loreborne • Scholar

> A young scholar devoted to recording the stories of the world through the eyes of those who live them.

**Witness (2):** Whenever an ally marks 2 or more Hit Points, place 1 token on this card.

**Strategic Notes:** Spend 1 token for Elizabeth to grant advantage on an ally’s next attack roll.

---

### Fionna MacTine

#### Faerie • Orderborne • Arcanist

> A pyromancer sorcerer whose temper ignites flames she cannot always control.

**Channel:** Whenever this ally gains the spotlight, place 1 token on this card.

**Fireball:** Spend 6 tokens to have Fionna launch a sphere of fire at a target within Very Far range. The target and all creatures within Very Close range of it must make a Reaction Roll (13). Targets that fail take 3d20+5 magic damage. Targets that succeed take half damage.

---

### Gilbert Balzath

#### Elf • Wanderborne • Gunslinger

> A wanderer of uncertain origins, always ready with his multi-shot firearm.

**Inspired:** Whenever an ally rolls with Hope on their Duality Dice, place 1 token on this card.

**Quick Shot:** Spend 1 token to have Gilbert deal 2d8 physical damage to an adversary within Close range.

**Unload!:** Once per rest, you may spend all tokens on this card to have Gilbert deal 1d6 physical damage to a single adversary within Close range for each token removed.

---

### Iruanê Anayru

#### Fungril • Underborne • Scout

> She knows every stone, every fungus, and every crawling thing that dwells within the depths of the caverns.

**Track:** Whenever an ally deals damage to an adversary, place 1 token on this card.

**Spore Veil:** Spend 3 tokens to make an ally within Close range Hidden temporarily.

**Exposed Trail:** Spend 3 tokens to make an adversary within Close range Vulnerable temporarily.

---

### Kapu, the Bearer

#### Galapa • Wildborne • Warden

> A tireless wanderer who finds ways to ease the burdens his companions carry.

**Prepared (3):** This card begins with 3 tokens and cannot gain additional tokens until the next rest.

**Silent Sacrifice:** Whenever an ally would mark 1 Stress, you may spend 1 token from this card to prevent it from being marked.

---

### Karl Bouldervein

#### Dwarf • Underborne • Hunter / Gunslinger

> A veteran of the slopes, he believes a good shot solves what words cannot.

**Opportunist:** Whenever an ally fails an attack roll, place 1 token on this card.

**Hunter’s Lasso:** Spend 3 tokens to temporarily restrain a target within Very Close range. A Restrained target is also Vulnerable, but Karl must remain within Very Close range of them.

**Sweeping Shot:** Spend 2 tokens to have Karl fire in a cone. Roll 3d6 and distribute the damage among all adversaries within Very Close range in front of him.

---

### Lukas Bifurson

#### Infernis • Orderborne • Warden

> An old strategist whose wisdom was forged both in war and along the paths he has walked.

**Prepared (3):** This card begins with 3 tokens and cannot gain additional tokens until the next rest.

**Veteran Orders:** Spend 1 token for Lukas to grant one of the following options. Each option can only be chosen once.

• An ally makes an attack with advantage.  
• An ally clears 1 Stress.  
• An ally adds 1d8 to a damage roll.

---

### Lyra Darkmoon

#### Elf / Human • Highborne • Oracle

> Heir to a mystical lineage, she interprets fate through the cards of those who cross her path.

**Foresee:** Whenever an ally uses an Experience, place 1 token on this card.

**Card of Fortune:** Spend 1 token for an ally to add 1d6 to a roll that uses an Experience.

**Card of Ruin:** Spend 3 tokens to choose an adversary within Close range. The next successful attack against that adversary deals 2d8 additional damage.

---

### Nix Sablewing

#### Faerie • Slyborne • Scoundrel / Alchemist

> Always with a hidden vial and an improvised plan, Nix turns mistakes into opportunities.

**Opportunist:** Whenever an ally fails an attack roll, place 1 token on this card.

**Improvised Poison:** Spend 1 token for Nix to give a vial of poison to an ally within Very Close range. An ally can use this poison on a melee attack to deal an additional 1d4 damage and make the target Vulnerable until they clear 1 Hit Point.

**Blinding Smoke:** Spend 3 tokens to have Nix throw a smoke bomb within Far range, creating an area of Very Close range around the point of impact. All targets within the smoke have disadvantage on their next rolls.

---

### Null Veyron

#### Clank • Orderborne • Hunter

> Created by mages, it learned their tactics and now specializes in silencing them.

**Foresee:** Whenever an ally uses an Experience, place 1 token on this card.

**Blind Spot:** Spend 1 token to make an ally within Close range Hidden until their next attack.

**Arcane Interference:** Spend 3 tokens to make an adversary Suppressed temporarily. While Suppressed, the target cannot cast spells.

---

### Quillian Shadowmoon

#### Simiah • Highborne • Performer

> A renowned traveling bard who brings his music to every corner he visits.

**Channel:** Whenever this ally gains the spotlight, place 1 token on this card.

**Captivate the Audience:** Spend 1 token to have Quillian temporarily Distract a target within Close range, reducing that target’s Difficulty by −2. You may spend 3 additional tokens for each extra target you wish to Distract in this way.

---

### Saheya of Kalyr

#### Halfling • Wildborne • Spiritist

> A maker of talismans, she protects those around her with magic and near-maternal care.

**Foresee:** Whenever an ally uses an Experience, place 1 token on this card.

**Protective Talisman:** Spend 2 tokens to grant a talisman to an ally within Close range. When the ally holding the talisman marks Hit Points, they may spend the talisman to reduce that amount by 1. An ally cannot carry more than one talisman at a time.

---

### Seth of the Dunes

#### Katari • Wanderborne • Scout

> A wanderer of the arid lands, he has learned that survival is always the greatest victory.

**Pressured:** Whenever an ally rolls with Fear on their Duality Dice, place 1 token on this card.

**Sand Step:** Spend 2 tokens for Seth to grant +2 Evasion to an ally within Close range until the next attack against them.

---

### Sovann Rai

#### Ribbet • Orderborne • Devout

> A devoted pilgrim, always willing to offer aid to those who cross his path.

**Witness (1):** Whenever an ally marks 1 or more Hit Points, place 1 token on this card.

**Restorative Blessing:** Spend 3 tokens to have Sovann clear 1 Hit Point or 1 Stress from an ally within Melee range.

---

### Tamir Paracelion

#### Halfling • Seaborne • Specialist / Alchemist

> An eccentric alchemist who claims to be perfecting “the ultimate formula of controlled combustion.”

**Inspired:** Whenever an ally rolls with Hope on their Duality Dice, place 1 token on this card.

**Alchemical Bomb:** Spend 3 tokens to have Tamir throw an explosive at a target within Far range, dealing 1d20+3 physical damage.

**Refreshing Tonic:** Spend 3 tokens to have Tamir clear 1 Hit Point from an ally within Melee range.

---

### Tharion Aegis

#### Clank • Loreborne • Scholar / Warden

> Adaptable to any situation, he is always one step ahead of the impact.

**Witness (1):** Whenever an ally marks 1 or more Hit Points, place 1 token on this card.

**Kinetic Barrier:** Spend 3 tokens to make an ally within Close range resistant to physical damage until the next attack.

**Arcane Barrier:** Spend 3 tokens to make an ally within Close range resistant to magic damage until the next attack.

An ally can only benefit from one of these effects at a time. Applying a new effect removes the previous one.

---

### Vexlin Bell

#### Goblin • Loreborne • Scholar / Arcanist

> A small student who used to fall asleep in class... until she realized it could be her greatest strength.

**Channel:** Whenever this ally gains the spotlight, place 1 token on this card.

**Drowsiness:** Spend 2 tokens to have Vexlin make an adversary within Very Close range Asleep until they take damage. Asleep targets cannot move or attack.

**Mass Sleep:** Spend 6 tokens to have Vexlin make 1d4 adversaries within Far range Asleep until they take damage.

---

### Yakov Kargan

#### Orc • Wildborne • Spiritist

> He bends the earth to his will, making his allies harder to bring down.

**Pressured:** Whenever an ally rolls with Fear on their Duality Dice, place 1 token on this card.

**Stone Skin:** Spend 2 tokens to choose an ally within Close range and increase their damage thresholds by +2. Only one ally can benefit from this ability at a time. You may spend 2 tokens again to choose a new target.
